scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:socket" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.stop: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$ports = @(5000,5001,5173); $pids = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $ports -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; if ($pids) { $pids | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force } ; Write-Output ('Stopped PIDs: ' + ($pids -join ', ')) } else { Write-Output 'No matching listeners found.' }"
scripts.stop:all: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Write-Output 'Stopped all node processes.'"
